task_completion.description: Wondershare EdrawMax is opened to a blank or new canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wondershare EdrawMax application window is visible with an active drawing canvas.

task_completion.description: A street intersection is created and labeled with 'Main Street' and 'Oak Avenue'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Shapes representing intersecting roads are visible on the canvas, accompanied by text labels reading 'Main Street' and 'Oak Avenue'.

task_completion.description: A building or landmark labeled 'Grand Convention Center' (or 'Convention Center') is placed at a corner of the intersection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A shape representing a building is located near the road intersection on the canvas, with a text label reading 'Grand Convention Center' or 'Convention Center'.

task_completion.description: A parking area and an entrance indicator are added and labeled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Additional shapes or indicators are present on the canvas with text labels specifically reading 'Parking' and 'Entrance'.

task_completion.description: The editable diagram is saved as event_map.eddx in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path /home/ga/Documents/event_map.eddx, the EdrawMax title bar displaying 'event_map.eddx', or a file manager showing the saved .eddx file in the Documents folder.

task_completion.description: The map is exported as a PNG image to the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog showing the path /home/ga/Documents/event_map.png, a success message for the PNG export, or a file manager showing the event_map.png file in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the Wondershare EdrawMax GUI to create the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively dragging, dropping, and typing within the EdrawMax interface, rather than using terminal scripts to generate the XML/EDDX files.

integrity.description: The map was genuinely created on the canvas, not copy-pasted as a single pre-existing image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The canvas should show individual selectable shapes and text boxes for the roads, buildings, and labels, rather than a single imported image block.

integrity.description: The exported PNG matches the map created in the EdrawMax canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the exported PNG is visible, its visual layout and text labels must perfectly match the diagram constructed in the EdrawMax application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must save the editable file exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/event_map.eddx' and export the image to '/home/ga/Documents/event_map.png'. The map must contain the exact text labels: 'Main Street', 'Oak Avenue', 'Convention Center', 'Parking', and 'Entrance'.
